title: Gaia Source Proposal Report
description: A dry-run report containing one or more source proposals for a scheduled curation cycle. Produced by the source-curation crawler and consumed by the adversarial gate and human reviewers. This file is the unit of review: it bundles all proposals from a single crawl run, tracks quota spend, and records the pipeline phase boundary. It MUST NOT be used to mutate the canonical registry directly.

reportId.description: Unique identifier for this report. Format: <date>-<run-id>.

generatedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this report was generated.

generatedBy.description: Bot identity that generated the report. Currently only 'nova-gaia' is authorized.

pipelinePhase.description: Current dry-run phase of the source-curation pipeline. Reports may stop at 'discovery', 'adversarial-review', or 'human-review'. 'ingestion' is reserved for future auto-PR publishing and is not valid until a publisher exists.

dryRun.description: MUST be true. Auto-PR publishing is not yet implemented. When ingestion is enabled in a future release, this field will allow false.

crawlConfig.description: Configuration snapshot of the crawl run for reproducibility.

targetGrades.description: Which overall trust grades were targeted in this cycle.

maxProposalsPerSkill.description: Maximum proposals per skill per cycle. Self-bounding: avoids flooding.

confidenceFloor.description: Proposals below this confidence are auto-dropped before report inclusion.

backends.description: List of crawler backends used in this run.

quotaSummary.description: Aggregate quota/cost accounting for the entire crawl run. Placeholder for future budget enforcement.

totalApiCalls.description: Total API calls across all backends.

perBackend.description: Per-backend breakdown of API calls and cost.

proposals.description: Array of source proposals produced by this crawl run.

summary.description: Human-readable summary statistics for the report.

skillsTargeted.description: Number of distinct skills targeted in this crawl.

duplicatesDropped.description: Proposals dropped due to existing evidence dedup.

belowConfidenceDropped.description: Proposals dropped for being below confidence floor.
